src: CodMate is a macOS SwiftUI app for managing CLI AI sessions: browse, search, organize, resume, and review work produced by Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI.  It focuses on speed, a compact three-column UI, and “ship it” workflows like Project Review (Git Changes) and one-click Resume/New.
ja: CodMateはCLI AIセッションを管理するmacOS SwiftUIアプリ。Codex・Claude Code・Gemini CLIが生成した成果物の閲覧・検索・整理・再開・レビューに対応。速度、3カラムのコンパクトなUI、Project Review（Git変更）やワンクリックResume/Newといった「すぐ出荷できる」ワークフローに特化
